files.content:
import type { TableBuilderConfig, TableRow } from "../../components/tables/types";

export interface Row extends TableRow {
  "name": string;
  "company": string;
  "email": string;
  "deal": number;
  "stage": string;
  "score": number;
  "priority": string;
  "lastContact": string;
}


export const tableConfig: TableBuilderConfig = {
  "title": "CRM Contacts",
  "description": "Customer relationship management dashboard.",
  "direction": "ltr",
  "density": "comfortable",
  "pageSize": 8,
  "sortMode": "api",
  "paginationMode": "api",
  "apiEndpoint": "https://api.example.com/contacts",
  "apiConfig": {
    "baseUrl": "https://api.example.com/contacts",
    "listMethod": "GET",
    "rowActions": [
      {
        "id": "stage",
        "columnKey": "stage",
        "trigger": "dropdown",
        "method": "PATCH",
        "path": "/:id/stage",
        "body": "{ \"stage\": {{value}}, \"previous\": {{row.stage}} }",
        "optimistic": true
      },
      {
        "id": "priority",
        "columnKey": "priority",
        "trigger": "dropdown",
        "method": "PATCH",
        "path": "/:id/priority",
        "body": "{ \"priority\": {{value}} }",
        "optimistic": true
      },
      {
        "id": "refresh",
        "columnKey": "actions",
        "trigger": "button",
        "method": "POST",
        "path": "/:id/refresh"
      }
    ]
  },
  "expandableLayout": "card",
  "expandableIconStyle": "chevron",
  "expandableIconPosition": "first",
  "paginationLayout": "full",
  "showPageSizeSelector": true,
  "pageSizeOptions": [
    8,
    16,
    32,
    64
  ],
  "virtualRowHeight": 44,
  "virtualMaxHeight": 520,
  "enableSearch": true,
  "enablePagination": true,
  "enableRowSelection": true,
  "enableDnD": true,
  "enableColumnVisibility": true,
  "enableExport": true,
  "enableStriped": false,
  "enableHover": true,
  "enableBordered": false,
  "enableStickyHeader": false,
  "enableExpandableRows": true,
  "enableInlineEdit": true,
  "enableBulkActions": true,
  "enableColumnResize": true,
  "enableMultiSort": true,
  "enableColumnFilters": true,
  "enableRowGrouping": false,
  "enableAggregation": false,
  "enableFooter": false,
  "columns": [
    {
      "id": "c1",
      "key": "name",
      "label": "Contact",
      "type": "avatar",
      "sortable": true,
      "filterable": true,
      "visible": true,
      "align": "left",
      "resizable": true,
      "width": 200
    },
    {
      "id": "c2",
      "key": "company",
      "label": "Company",
      "type": "text",
      "sortable": true,
      "filterable": true,
      "visible": true,
      "align": "left",
      "resizable": true,
      "width": 160
    },
    {
      "id": "c3",
      "key": "email",
      "label": "Email",
      "type": "email",
      "sortable": true,
      "filterable": true,
      "visible": true,
      "align": "left",
      "resizable": true,
      "width": 200
    },
    {
      "id": "c4",
      "key": "deal",
      "label": "Deal Value",
      "type": "currency",
      "sortable": true,
      "filterable": false,
      "visible": true,
      "align": "right",
      "format": "$"
    },
    {
      "id": "c5",
      "key": "stage",
      "label": "Stage",
      "type": "dropdown",
      "sortable": true,
      "filterable": true,
      "visible": true,
      "align": "left",
      "options": [
        {
          "label": "Lead",
          "value": "Lead"
        },
        {
          "label": "Qualified",
          "value": "Qualified"
        },
        {
          "label": "Proposal",
          "value": "Proposal"
        },
        {
          "label": "Negotiation",
          "value": "Negotiation"
        },
        {
          "label": "Closed",
          "value": "Closed"
        }
      ]
    },
    {
      "id": "c6",
      "key": "score",
      "label": "Score",
      "type": "progress",
      "sortable": true,
      "filterable": false,
      "visible": true,
      "align": "center"
    },
    {
      "id": "c7",
      "key": "priority",
      "label": "Priority",
      "type": "status-dot",
      "sortable": true,
      "filterable": true,
      "visible": true,
      "align": "left",
      "options": [
        {
          "label": "High",
          "value": "High",
          "color": "hsl(0 84% 60%)"
        },
        {
          "label": "Medium",
          "value": "Medium",
          "color": "hsl(38 92% 50%)"
        },
        {
          "label": "Low",
          "value": "Low",
          "color": "hsl(var(--muted-foreground))"
        }
      ]
    },
    {
      "id": "c8",
      "key": "lastContact",
      "label": "Last Contact",
      "type": "date",
      "sortable": true,
      "filterable": false,
      "visible": true,
      "align": "left"
    },
    {
      "id": "c9",
      "key": "actions",
      "label": "",
      "type": "actions",
      "sortable": false,
      "filterable": false,
      "visible": true,
      "align": "right"
    }
  ]
} as const satisfies TableBuilderConfig;
